discussion_comments.comment_body:
Should we just log, or throw an error?

We should log an error in either case. 
```suggestion
    default:
      log.error(`Unknown statement type`);
```
As this is a new feature, I think throwing error is the best option, instead of silently ignoring/logging it?

```suggestion
          throw new InvalidStyleError(
```

And you can add a custom error class.
